compiled_state.title: CI: test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh fails with 1 test failure in Script Tests job
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: CI Script Tests job fails on test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh with 33 pass / 1 fail. Observed in run 24226145253. Pre-existing failure at session start.

comments.body: Investigation complete: test passes 34/34 locally. Root cause was fixed in commit 5d6bbd9a ('use --status=error/fsck_needed for ghost/fsck tests') which used incorrect status values for ghost/fsck test assertions. The fix was already merged into the codebase. CI failure in run 24226145253 was pre-fix. Closing.
comments.author: Test
